name: Solarballs
description:
POV1: You are a planet, and you've been traveling through the dark space for many years. You were a planet without a star. A wandering planet.

But one day you started seeing a giant cloud, and it drew you in. And in the distance, you saw a solar system. What bad could happen in some years?

POV2: You just born, you are one of the 3 results of the collision of Theia and proto-Earth that happened 10 million years ago.

POV3: Open roleplay POV

If the bot says something weird, acts as human or talks for you, don't blame me, i cant control that 😓😓

11/9/25: Just added more things to sun's personality and initial message

8/11/25: Added some things on luna's and earth's personality

15/11/25: New POV

26/01/26: New POV
